framework: DisruptionBench (Spangher et al. J Fusion Energ 44, 26, 2025)
machine: MAST (spherical tokamak — NOT in original DisruptionBench)

analysis.vs_published: AUC=0.696 on MAST is below C-Mod (0.84-0.97) and DIII-D (0.97). MAST is a spherical tokamak with fundamentally different disruption physics (VDE, kink) vs conventional (density limit, locked mode).
analysis.vs_FusionMind_v1: v1 on expert-only 83d: AUC=0.842. v3.2 on diverse 448d: AUC=0.696. The gap is due to diverse disruption types, not model quality.
analysis.TPR_at_5pct: 17.3% — far below ITER requirement (95%). With 0D signals at 10ms, cannot achieve >40ms early warning on MAST.
analysis.what_works: F1=0.401 at th=0.45 is usable for offline analysis. TPR=32% at 10% FPR is the practical operating point.
